response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor requiring 15 years of experience plus recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms. The candidate has roughly 13-14 years of professional experience (post-2012), no advanced degree in AI, no track record of building or shipping recognized AI products, and limited cloud-platform strategy or executive-level advisory experience. Fit is well below the Principal/Director bar.
strengths: Broad polyglot, full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Demonstrated thought leadership through workshops, talks, open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Experience is closer to ~13 years; falls short of the 15-year minimum required
No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale this Principal role demands
Career trajectory is senior IC, not Director-level strategic advisory to executives, customers, and partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform track record
Below 15-year experience threshold and not at Director-level seniority
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling exposure at re:cinq
